mapper.select: SELECT ss.seq AS seq, ss.name AS name, ss.phone_number AS phoneNumber, COALESCE(ss.template_name, st.name, '(삭제된 설문지)') AS templateName, ss.created_date AS createdDate FROM survey_submissions ss LEFT JOIN survey_templates st ON st.seq = ss.template_seq WHERE ss.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND ss.referenced = FALSE ORDER BY ss.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM survey_submissions ss WHERE ss.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND ss.referenced = FALSE
